title: Crisp Mustard Kimchi
description: A rich and crisp Korean dish featuring dijon mustard, cured vegetables, and a dash-friendly twist.

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup finely chopped red bell pepper
1/3 cup rice vinegar
ingredients.notes: Used to create the curing brine.

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine finely chopped napa cabbage and red bell pepper.
Add minced garlic and salt to the mixture. Toss well until all ingredients are evenly coated.
Divide the mixture into four portions and shape each portion into small kimchi balls or patties.
Place the prepared kimchi in a shallow dish with enough rice vinegar brine to cover them, allowing them to cure for at least 2 hours at room temperature.
After curing, place the kimchi on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and sprinkle with Dijon mustard.
Bake at 400°F (205°C) for about 10-15 minutes or until crisp and golden brown.
Remove from oven and serve warm as an appetizer.
